Text.Page:
Did you notice the weapons those {@LinkCreature:19#4000#Lokians} fight with? I'd love to get my hands on some.

Say, if you went out and got me some I could send them to Velika high command, and they could duplicate them for federation soldiers.

What do you say?"

Fantastic! I'll send these to Velika right away.

Oh, just imagine it, !

...what? I happen to like new weapons. Mine are a bit grubby.

You have a problem using the enemy's resources to grow stronger?

I think it's the wisest move we could possibly make.
